title: Day 8: Day 08 — The First Conversation
content:
# Day 08 — The First Conversation

## Topic
How to run a strong first recruiting conversation that uncovers real motivation and sets up a compelling follow-up.

## Key Points
- Start with discovery, not pitching: ask what they love about their current setup and what frustrates them.
- Listen more than you talk: your goal is to understand their goals, pain points, and timeline.
- Use high-signal questions: income goals, support gaps, lead quality, team fit, and growth ambitions.
- Apply the two-call method: first call = discovery, second call = tailored presentation.
- Capture notes immediately so your follow-up is personalized and relevant.

## Why It Matters
Most recruiters lose great agents by pitching too early. A discovery-first conversation builds trust, reveals the real switching triggers, and gives you the exact material to present your brokerage as the right next move.
